DatasetTask Description
HotpotQA / 2WikiMulti- hopQAanswer multi-hop questions
NQanswer natural questions from Google search
AidaYago 2 / WnWi / WnCw / Blinklink the mention surrounded by [START_ENT] and [END_ENT] to the title of the correct Wikipedia page
FEVERverify if the claim is supported or refuted
T-REx / Zero-Shot REgiven head entity and relation separated by [SEP], find the correct tail entity, return the title of its Wikipedia page
Trivia QAanswer trivia questions
MuSiQue / Bamboogleanswer multi-hop questions
